name: @borjie/dp-federation
description: Differential-privacy federation primitives for Wave SELFIMPROVE. Renyi-DP accountant (Mironov 2017 closed-form Gaussian bound), RDP -> (epsilon,delta) conversion, per-tenant epsilon-budget tracker with audit trail, DP-mean with Gaussian noise. Numerics validated against Mironov 2017 Table 1 reference vectors. Implements Docs/DESIGN/SELF_IMPROVE_AND_DP_FEDERATION_SPEC.md.
